words.def: group of aircraft operating together under the same ownership
words.zh: n. 艦隊, 港灣, 小河
vt. 感覺, 覺得, 觸控, 以為

words.def: location near or direction toward the left side; i.e. the side to the north when a person or object faces east
words.zh: a. 左邊的, 左傾的, 左側的, 左派的

words.def: a brutal terrorist group active in Kashmir; fights against India with the goal of restoring Islamic rule of India
words.zh: vt. 讓, 假設, 出租, 排放, 妨礙
